summary: Tested JIT (Au plus tard) mode with late orders functionality. All 6 features verified working correctly: (1) JIT returns OPTIMAL instead of INFEASIBLE, (2) late_orders array with lateness_hours, (3) gantt/data returns is_late/lateness_minutes, (4) Gantt red bars for late ops, (5) Diagnostic 'Retards' tab, (6) Alert banner for late orders.
seed_data_creation: Used existing JIT scenario ba7a4e09-fa28-4d2f-b408-01667497ae76 (Test JIT avec retards)
context_for_next_testing_agent: JIT late orders functionality fully tested. Key scenario: ba7a4e09-fa28-4d2f-b408-01667497ae76 with 2 late orders (OF1: 196h, OF2: 69.6h) and 1 on-time order (OF3).

jit_returns_optimal.description: JIT mode returns OPTIMAL status instead of INFEASIBLE when due dates cannot be met
jit_returns_optimal.implementation: scheduler_engine.py lines 793-900 - soft constraints with lateness variables
jit_returns_optimal.test_result: Status is OPTIMAL with late_orders detected

late_orders_detection.description: Late orders are detected and stored in schedule_data.late_orders with lateness_hours

gantt_data_is_late.description: /api/gantt/data/{id} returns is_late=true and lateness_minutes for late operations

gantt_red_bars.description: Gantt displays red bars (#EF4444) for late operations

diagnostic_retards_tab.description: Diagnostic page has 'Retards' tab with detailed late order information

diagnostic_alert.description: Diagnostic page shows alert banner when orders are late
diagnostic_alert.alert_description: En mode 'Au plus tard', certains ordres ne peuvent pas respecter leur date de besoin...

api_endpoints_tested.notes: Returns is_late and lateness_minutes per operation

implementation_notes.soft_constraints: JIT mode uses soft constraints with lateness variables (LATENESS_PENALTY = 10000) to minimize delays instead of making scenario INFEASIBLE
implementation_notes.order_propagation: All operations of a late order are marked is_late=true consistently
